video_results.title: AI Trends 2026: Quantum, Agentic AI & Smarter Automation
Combination of AI and automation is very powerful, says UiPath CEO Daniel Dines
How artificial intelligence is changing Amazon’s workforce

llm_synthesis:

Experts like UiPath CEO Daniel Dines highlight the powerful combination of AI and automation. Additionally, companies like Amazon are leveraging artificial intelligence to change their workforce dynamics. | Integrity Check: Pass
